goals.description: Finalize, upload, and submit the scholarship application (essay + 2 files) to the portal before 23:59 today.
goals.rationale: This is non-negotiable. Losing this funding feels like a total failure of my potential, and I refuse to let that happen. The opportunity cost of inaction is real, and I'm not going to sound weak or ask for extensions; I'm claiming victory before the deadline hits so I don't have to deal with the fallout of sleep deprivation tomorrow. My focus capacity is at 6/10, but procrastination bias is high, so I need to force execution now rather than risk the entire application slipping through the cracks.

goals.description: Execute the scheduled meal with cohort_3 at 19:00 sharp, enforcing a strict 45-minute hard stop.
goals.rationale: Socializing has value only if it's efficient. Since I've already risked momentum on the scholarship, I can't afford another open-ended chat that bleeds into study time. I'll show them I respect our time by sticking to the clock. If they try to extend it, I'll be direct: 'We're done at 19:45, no exceptions.' This protects my focus capacity without burning bridges, even though I trust them enough to know they won't push me too far.
